rcc_adc_en.context:
rcc_ble_en();          // 使能 BLE 模块时钟
>>>     rcc_adc_en();          // 使能 ADC 模块时钟
    
        rcc_fshclk_set(FSH_CLK_DPSC42);  // 设置 Flash 高速时钟分频

pwm_chnl_set.context:
chnl_conf.ccer = PWM_CCER_SIPH | PWM_CCxDE_BIT; // DMA_EN
        // duty/(arr+1) = 50%(Duty Ratio). 50% high, 50% low
>>>     pwm_chnl_set(PWM_ATMR_CH(PA_ATMR_P), &chnl_conf);// PWM+
        
        #if (PA_ATMR_N)

chnl_conf.ccer = PWM_CCER_SIPH | PWM_CCxDE_BIT; // DMA_EN
        // duty/(arr+1) = 50%(Duty Ratio). 50% high, 50% low
>>>     pwm_chnl_set(PWM_ATMR_CH(PA_ATMR_P), &chnl_conf);// PWM+
        
        pwm_chnl_set(PWM_ATMR_CH(PA_ATMR_N), &chnl_conf);// PWM-

chnl_conf.ccer = PWM_CCER_SIPH | PWM_CCxDE_BIT; // DMA_EN
        // duty/(arr+1) = 50%(Duty Ratio). 50% high, 50% low
>>>     pwm_chnl_set(PWM_ATMR_CH(PA_ATMR_P), &chnl_conf);// PWM+
    
        #if (PA_ATMR_N)

chnl_conf.ccer = PWM_CCER_SIPH | PWM_CCxDE_BIT; // DMA_EN
        // duty/(arr+1) = 50%(Duty Ratio). 50% high, 50% low
>>>     pwm_chnl_set(PWM_ATMR_CH(PA_ATMR_P), &chnl_conf);// PWM+
    
        #if (PA_ATMR_N)

sadc_init.context:
// SADC initialization
        #if (SAMP_PCM)
>>>     sadc_init(SADC_ANA_DFLT | SADC_INBUF_BYPSS_BIT);  // PCM mode, bypass input buffer
        #else
        sadc_init(SADC_ANA_DFLT);  // Default analog config

sadc_init(SADC_ANA_DFLT | SADC_INBUF_BYPSS_BIT);  // PCM mode, bypass input buffer
        #else
>>>     sadc_init(SADC_ANA_DFLT);  // Default analog config
        #endif

rcc_ble_en.context:
iwdt_disable();       // 禁用独立看门狗定时器
    
>>>     rcc_ble_en();          // 使能 BLE 模块时钟
        rcc_adc_en();          // 使能 ADC 模块时钟
